## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `python main.py`
2. Enter file path `...`
3. Choose option `...`
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Error Message
```
Paste the error message or stack trace here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- LOBSTER version: [e.g. 0.1.0-alpha]

## File Info (if relevant)
- File format: [e.g. CSV, Excel, JSON]
- File size: [e.g. 2MB]
- Encoding: [e.g. UTF-8]

## Additional Context
Any other context or screenshots about the problem.
